pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Save the modified project as OpenConcept'

Web search of DreamPlan file extensions documentation shows .ddp is the standard DreamPlan project file format. No evidence found for .dp being a valid extension. Search results consistently mention: .3dn (models), .ddp (projects), .pso, and .vso as DreamPlan file types.

Web searches did not return authoritative documentation on the default project directory location. Other tasks in the same environment claim different paths: 'Documents\DreamPlan Projects' (add_backyard_gazebo) and 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\NCH Software\DreamPlan\Projects' (install_wheelchair_ramp). No official NCH documentation found specifying the correct default path.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks to save a modified DreamPlan project file as 'OpenConcept' with a file extension. Verified extension for DreamPlan projects is .ddp (not .dp as claimed in metadata). The specific default project directory path could not be independently verified from web sources.
